prompt: A serene anime-style summer portrait of a young woman standing outdoors under a vivid blue sky with 4 soft white cloud clusters visible near the frame edges and a few tiny sparkling light specks in the air. She is shown from a low angle, framed from about the waist up, slightly turned to the side while looking calmly toward the viewer with a gentle, quiet expression. She has long, straight very dark indigo-black hair with full blunt bangs covering the forehead and many loose strands flowing dramatically to the right in the wind, large soft brown-gray eyes, pale skin, and a faint blush on her cheeks. She wears a wide-brimmed natural straw sunhat with a dark band and a simple sleeveless white summer dress with thin straps and minimal detail. Lighting is bright midday sunlight with soft cel-shaded anime rendering, subtle rim light, clean linework, delicate gradients, and a dreamy polished illustration style. The mood is airy, nostalgic, elegant, and peaceful, with the sky filling the background and no buildings or other objects.
